purpose: Customer-facing opportunity list for broker campaign planning. Not personal contact data.

opportunities.broker_use_case: Run crypto futures education, demo, exchange signup or affiliate campaign.
opportunities.campaign_angle: Crypto volatility is creating fresh futures and exchange intent.
opportunities.outreach_hook: We can package today's active crypto futures traffic themes for your exchange.
opportunities.compliance_note: Public intent signal only. Not a personal contact record.
opportunities.recommended_next_step: Package crypto futures audience and creator topics
